## Description
Please describe the changes you are proposing and the rationale behind them.

Fixes # (issue link or number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue or typo)
- [ ] New notes/content addition
- [ ] Visual asset or flowchart update
- [ ] Code improvement/optimization

## Checklist
- [ ] I have ran the local audit script `python tests/test_guide.py` and all checks passed successfully.
- [ ] My code changes follow the left-aligned format rules with zero indentation.
- [ ] If I added mathematical equations, they render correctly in LaTeX format.
- [ ] If I added a flowchart, the Mermaid syntax compiles with no parsing errors.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` index/roadmap if introducing a new topic file.
